date.description: Date stamp in which the sub-merchant provided his consent on the terms and conditions. Date must be in [ISO 8601 format](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3339#section-5.6)

firstName.description: First name of person that gave consent

lastName.description: Last name of person that gave consent

jobTitle.description: Job title of person that gave consent

consentUuid.description: Universally Unique Identifier (UUID) of the consent that the user consented to

consentVersion.description: Version of the consent that the user consented to
